topics.title: Television Advertising and Film Production
topics.summary: The studio discusses the economics of television commercials, the benefits of a well-equipped workplace, and features a comedic short film titled "Butt Crack Mountain."

topics.title: Website Issues and Film Festival Updates
topics.summary: The studio discusses technical difficulties with the website, frustrations regarding a lack of information on an upcoming film festival, and various listener interactions.

topics.title: Technical Issues with Satellite Radio
topics.summary: The studio discusses technical malfunctions with a satellite radio unit and the difficulties of navigating channels and using a CD player.

topics.title: Vice President Cheney Shooting Incident
topics.summary: The studio discusses the circumstances surrounding a hunting accident involving Vice President Dick Cheney, focusing on ballistics, the timeline of reporting, and the specific details of the shooting of Harold Whittington.

topics.title: G. Gordon Liddy and Watergate History
topics.summary: The studio discusses G. Gordon Liddy's history during the Nixon administration, his tenure in prison, and his reputation as a volatile figure.

topics.title: Assassination Plots and Military Service
topics.summary: The studio explores a guest's past as a Navy SEAL, discussing failed assassination plots against a columnist, his military service in the Middle East, and the nuances of firearm selection.

topics.title: G. Gordon Liddy and Terrorism Tactics
topics.summary: The studio features G. Gordon Liddy and a Navy SEAL to discuss his new book on counter-terrorism, personal safety measures in urban environments, and the logistics of military operations.

topics.title: G. Gordon Liddy Interview
topics.summary: The studio features G. Gordon Liddy and his son Jim discussing military life, self-defense, and personal anecdotes before transitioning into a discussion of upcoming show segments.

topics.title: Lisa Lampanelli Discusses Dating and Relationships
topics.summary: The studio features Lisa Lampanelli discussing her dating preferences, past relationships with various men, and her views on the sex industry.

topics.title: Lisa Lampinelli Roast Experience
topics.summary: The show features Lisa Lampinelli discussing her career milestones, including her appearance on the Pam Anderson roast and her interactions with various celebrities.

topics.title: Lisa Lampanelli Comedy Career and Roast Performance
topics.summary: The show features Lisa Lampanelli discussing her comedy career, the boundaries of roast humor, and her upcoming tour dates while interacting with callers.

topics.title: XM Satellite Radio and Oprah Winfrey Partnership
topics.summary: The studio discusses the potential impact of Oprah Winfrey's limited presence on XM satellite radio and the subsequent resignation of a board member concerned about company spending.

topics.title: Celebrity News and Media Analysis
topics.summary: The studio discusses various celebrity stories, including a teacher's arrest for molestation, the honorary law enforcement status of celebrities like Shaq and Elvis Presley, and an analysis of Howard Stern's media presence compared to Oprah Winfrey.

topics.title: Radio and Cable Television Market Dynamics
topics.summary: The studio discusses the competitive landscape of radio, the potential impact of FCC regulations on cable television bundles, and the viability of niche programming.

topics.title: Pop Culture and Celebrity News
topics.summary: The studio discusses various topics including a controversial German album, celebrity rumors involving David Hasselhoff and Ben Affleck, the career of a local officer known as Club Soda Kenny, and public criticism regarding Britney Spears' parenting.
